children.label: a
children.text: Funds appropriated to the Department of Defense for research and development remain available for obligation for a period of two consecutive years.
for the purposes of ; andsection 4141 of this title
for purposes related to research and development for which expenditures are specifically authorized in other appropriations of the Department of Defense.
